name: devforge
description: A controlled, human-gated agentic coding loop: triage → [triage gate] → validate → explore → architect → [design gate] → implement ↔ review ↔ test → [pre-merge gate] → merge, keeping the implementer and reviewer independent. Provides /devforge and the human-only /devforge-approve-triage, /devforge-approve-design, and /devforge-approve-merge.
